state.title: bench-targets/large-log/math.test.mjs

part.text: I can see the issue. The `add` function returns `a - b` instead of `a + b`. Let me verify with the tests first, then fix it.

metadata.diff:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/openrtk-large-test-log-debug-3/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/openrtk-large-test-log-debug-3/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/openrtk-large-test-log-debug-3/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }

filediff.patch:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/openrtk-large-test-log-debug-3/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/openrtk-large-test-log-debug-3/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/openrtk-large-test-log-debug-3/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }

part.text: Tests fail - the `add` function returns `-2` instead of `2`. The bug is on line 2 of `math.mjs`: it uses `-` (subtract) instead of `+` (add).

state.title: Count passing/failing tests

part.text:
**Diagnosis and Fix Complete**

**Root Cause:** Bug in `/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs:2`

**Before:**
```mjs
return a - b  // subtract instead of add
```

**After:**
```mjs
return a + b  // corrected
```

**Verification:**
```bash
node --test bench-targets/large-log/math.test.mjs
```
- **80 tests** - **0 failed**
- `add(index, 2)` now correctly returns `index + 2`
